description: Community Engagement Plan: Digital Asset Thought Leadership Strategy

slides.title: Specialist Publications
slides.subtitle: Reaching buyers through trusted trade media

slides.title: The Digital Banker
slides.col1:
Global B2B media with 67K subscribers targeting C-suite banking and financial services leaders.

Engagement: branded content, thought leadership interviews, awards nominations, event sponsorship.

Cost: EUR 10K-25K initial investment.
slides.col2:
Actions:
- Request media kit from editorial team
- Pitch CEO interview on digital assets
- Nominate for annual industry awards

Timeline: Month 1-4

slides.title: Ledger Insights
slides.col1:
Most credible enterprise blockchain publication globally. Focused exclusively on institutional digital assets, DLT, and tokenization.

Engagement: guest articles, news coverage (free if accepted), long-term editorial relationships.

Cost: EUR 0-5K. Highest ROI channel in this plan.
slides.col2:
Actions:
- Pitch first guest article on DALP use cases
- Build direct relationships with editors
- Include in all press outreach going forward

Timeline: Month 1-4, then ongoing

slides.title: The Tokenizer
slides.col1:
European tokenization-focused publication. Publishes the annual Who's Who guide listing 85+ issuance platforms. Strong reach across European asset managers and issuers.

Engagement: Who's Who directory listing, editorial coverage, RegRadar subscription for regulatory intelligence.

Cost: EUR 5K-12K/year.
slides.col2:
Actions:
- Contact CEO Michael Juul Rugaard directly
- Confirm DALP listing in Who's Who 2026 guide
- Explore editorial partnership

Timeline: Month 1-4

slides.title: Digital Asset Research
slides.col1:
Institutional data provider serving Bloomberg, FTSE Russell, and similar clients. Not a media outlet. Value lies in data taxonomy alignment and B2B referral potential.

Engagement: data integration partnership, co-webinar, mutual referral network.

Cost: EUR 0-10K. Relationship play, lower urgency.
slides.col2:
Actions:
- Explore data taxonomy integration with DALP
- Propose a co-hosted institutional webinar

Timeline: Month 2-6, lower priority

slides.title: Blockworks
slides.col1:
Leading crypto media and events company. 2M+ monthly visitors, 100K+ newsletter subscribers. Strong institutional and crypto-native audience overlap.

Engagement: newsletter sponsorship, sponsored content, DAS conference presence, podcast appearances.

Cost: EUR 20K-60K.
slides.col2:
Actions:
- Book advertising call with sales team
- Start with On the Margin newsletter sponsorship
- Explore DAS London speaking or sponsorship

Timeline: Month 1-6

slides.title: ITSA Token Standards
slides.col1:
International Token Standardization Association. Manages ITIN, ITC, and TOKENBASE global token standards. Active ISO participation for digital asset classification.

Engagement: Active Membership, PWG1/PWG2 technical working groups, TOKENBASE listing for DALP asset templates.

Cost: EUR 3K-10K/year plus time investment.
slides.col2:
Actions:
- Apply for Active Membership
- Submit DALP asset templates to TOKENBASE database
- Join PWG1 or PWG2 working group

Timeline: Month 1-4

slides.title: GDF Global Digital Finance
slides.col1:
Industry standards body with member firms including Fireblocks, Circle, PayPal, EY, and Deloitte. Strong EU regulatory focus and MiCA working groups.

Engagement: Tokenization Forum, EU Policy Working Group, co-authored whitepapers.

Cost: EUR 8K-20K/year plus time. Highest ROI regulatory body for MiCA relevance.
slides.col2:
Actions:
- Enquire about membership requirements and fees
- Attend Digital Payments Forum as observer
- Join EU Policy Working Group on tokenization

Timeline: Month 1-6

slides.title: FIBREE
slides.col1:
Foundation for International Blockchain and Real Estate Expertise. 12K+ members, 80+ chapters globally. Hosts annual Global Blockchain Real Estate Summit and publishes the Industry Report.

Engagement: Company Membership, local meetup sponsorship, summit speaking, Industry Report contributor.

Cost: EUR 3K-8K/year.
slides.col2:
Actions:
- Secure Company Membership
- Present at meetups in London, Amsterdam, Dubai
- Submit to Industry Report as contributor

Timeline: Month 1-6

slides.title: PropTech and Telegram Communities
slides.col1:
Future Proptech events: 10K+ attendees, strong institutional property audience. MetaProp: leading real estate VC network with broad industry reach.

Telegram communities: @RWA_COMMUNITY (51K members), @rwaboliorg (3K members), @tokenizedrwa (growing).

Cost: EUR 5K-18K combined for events and organic participation.
slides.col2:
Actions:
- Join all three Telegram groups, participate organically
- Pitch speaking slot at Future Proptech conference
- Propose AMA session in RWA Community

Timeline: Month 1-6

slides.title: Digital Asset Influencers
slides.subtitle: Reaching institutional buyers through trusted voices

slides.title: Newsletter Sponsorships
slides.col1:
Key newsletters with institutional reach:
- Fintech Blueprint by Lex Sokolin: 200K+ subscribers, institutional focus
- SmartBlocks/Mark Fidelman: crypto-native audience with corporate crossover
- Integra Layer: tokenization-specific newsletter, early-adopter audience

Cost: EUR 8K-20K for a 6-month campaign across newsletters.
slides.col2:
Actions:
- Sponsor Fintech Blueprint for 3-6 months
- Pitch interview to SmartBlocks on DALP capabilities
- Explore Integra Layer co-published research

Timeline: Month 1-6

slides.title: 51.xyz
slides.col1:
B2B marketing agency with 100K+ institutional network and 20K executive newsletter subscribers. Specializes in GTM campaigns for digital asset infrastructure.

Engagement: research distribution, newsletter sponsorship, targeted GTM campaigns.

Cost: EUR 20K-60K for a 3-month campaign.

Highest single-channel ROI: one DALP deal conversion exceeds entire campaign cost.
slides.col2:
Actions:
- Book intro call with 51.xyz team
- Test newsletter sponsorship at EUR 5K
- Commission a co-branded research piece

Timeline: Month 1-6

slides.title: 30/90/180-Day Roadmap
slides.col1:
30 Days: Quick Wins
- Request Digital Banker media kit
- Contact Ledger Insights editors
- Apply for ITSA and GDF membership
- Join all three Telegram groups
- Book 51.xyz intro call
- Secure FIBREE Company Membership
slides.col2:
90 Days: Build Momentum
- Publish first thought leadership article via Ledger Insights
- Launch first newsletter sponsorship (Blockworks or 51.xyz)
- Present at first FIBREE local meetup
- Join GDF EU Policy Working Group
slides.col3:
180 Days: Measured Impact
- 3 published articles across trade media
- 2 active standards working groups
- 10+ qualified leads from newsletter campaigns
- 1 major event sponsorship confirmed

slides.title: Year 1 Budget
slides.body: Recommended starting budget: EUR 80K-120K. Full range reflects channel mix and negotiated rates.

slides.title: ROI Framework
slides.body:
Key metrics per channel:
- Newsletter: click-through rate, demo requests, UTM-attributed traffic
- Events: leads captured, meetings booked, pipeline value generated
- Working groups: partnerships seeded, regulatory access, co-authored content
- Content: article views, LinkedIn shares, inbound inquiries

Target: At DALP deal sizes of EUR 100K-1M+, 1-2 conversions cover the entire Year 1 program.

Track monthly. Review channel mix at 90 days. Reallocate budget to top-performing channels.
